spec: the + — S6 BRIEF: insight κs (S4) with enforced provenance (S5) become one proactive message (ANIMA's first letter), delivered to the inbox/voice with no query. The brief is a sealed κ-object ordered by confidence; it renders BY VERIFICATION — each line re-checked against the live evidence at display time, so a claim whose source was tampered drops out and is named in `refused`; intact lines remain. Delivery is a swappable sink and never carries an unverified claim
authority: UOR-ADDR (κ = H(canonical_form)) · W3C PROV-O · IETF RFC 8785 (JCS) · holospaces Law L5 · rests on #holo-ingest + #holo-map + #holo-insight

sample.letter:
I looked at what you just added and found 6 things worth your attention:
1. Acme Corp is corroborated by 2 independent sources.  (confidence 89%, 2 sources)
2. Berlin is corroborated by 2 independent sources.  (confidence 89%, 2 sources)
3. Acme Corp is the most connected entity (3 relationships) — the natural focal point.  (confidence 70%, 2 sources)
4. This data looks organizational / CRM-like (1 Organization, 1 Place, 1 Person).  (confidence 65%, 2 sources)
5. "Acme Corp holo:hasRole/CEO Dana Lee" rests on a single source — corroborate before relying on it.  (confidence 50%, 1 source)
6. "Acme Corp holo:year 2023" rests on a single source — corroborate before relying on it.  (confidence 50%, 1 source)
